creator: citrin+pr@citrin.ru
text:
Created attachment 186356
Update to 1.3.1-9

Please update libfpx to the latest version.

- remove dead mirrors from MASTER_SITES and add one more working
- use configure instead own Makefile.bsd to simplify maintenance (there was a build error with Makefile.bsd)
- http://www.i3a.org/ site doesn't contain any information about libfpx now, change URL to http://www.imagemagick.org/. It also doesn't contain info about libfix, but at lease libfpx is distributed by ImageMagic now.

Tested with 'poudriere testport' on supported releases.
No new portlint warnings was added.

See also bug222309
